[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 11/21 (Tue)!

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 11/21 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 11/28 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
